headlines.headline: Krevum Pharmaceuticals completes strategic acquisition to strengthen enterprise software

sentiment.reasoning: The completion of a strategic acquisition to strengthen enterprise software suggests a positive long-term strategic move for the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
